title: calculation.eec.completed data
description: Data payload for the calculation.eec.completed event. Models EecCalcOutput from activitycontracts: includes eecJobId (upstream NUID from job-grpc Init RPC) and durationMs alongside result access.

jobId.description: UUIDv7 job identifier; also the Temporal workflow ID.

tenantKey.description: Tenant identifier of the submitting organization.

calcType.description: Calculator type. Always 'eec' for this event.

calcName.description: Optional human-readable calculation name supplied at submission.

completedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the job completed.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the calculation activity as observed by the worker, in milliseconds.

outputUrl.description: URL to download the protojson CalculatorResponse (CRS) result. May be a signed short-lived URL.

eecJobId.description: Upstream job-grpc job ID (NUID) assigned during Init RPC, captured for traceability.
